# FilmDuel

> A movie quiz app where players duel each other on film knowledge.

## What is FilmDuel?

FilmDuel (filmduel.space) is a competitive movie quiz app with three game modes:

- **Solo Mode** — Single player, choose a category, answer questions, get a rating
- **Local Duo** — Pass-the-phone mode for two players on one device
- **Online Mode** — Async multiplayer (QuizDuell-style), challenge friends online

## How to play

1. Visit filmduel.space
2. Choose a game mode
3. Select a film category (18 categories available)
4. Answer 3 questions per round within 20 seconds each
5. Get rated: from "Film Student" to "Film Critic Legend"

## Categories

18 film categories including genres, decades, directors, and more.

## Rating System (Solo Mode)

| Score | Title |
|-------|-------|
| 90%+ | Film Critic Legend |
| 75%+ | Cinephile |
| 55%+ | Cinema Fan |
| 35%+ | Casual Viewer |
| <35% | Film Student |

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: Vanilla JavaScript (ES Modules), Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Convex (real-time database + auth)
- Auth: Google OAuth
- Deployment: Vercel
- PWA: Yes (installable as app)

## Links

- App: https://filmduel.space
- Built by: Maurice Walkenhorst
